/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_coms.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_csp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_ftpfcd.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_ftprdp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_orbital.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_radial.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_model.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_s_control.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/miman_autopilot.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BEE-1000.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o BEE-1000  -lcurl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 -lGLEW -lglut -lcurl -lpthread -lGL -lGLEW -lglut -lglbinding -lssh /mnt/c/Users/energ/Desktop/ACL/GS/0721/FTP_Ryu/lib/libsgp4/libsgp4.a /mnt/c/Users/energ/Desktop/ACL/GS/0721/FTP_Ryu/lib/imgui/libimgui.a /mnt/c/Users/energ/Desktop/ACL/GS/0721/FTP_Ryu/lib/gscsp/build/libmimancsp.a lib/libftp_client_ryu/libftp_client_ryu.a /mnt/c/Users/energ/Desktop/ACL/GS/0721/FTP_Ryu/lib/libftp_client_ryu/../gscsp/build/libmimancsp.a
